title: UAF in content::RenderFrameImpl::CommitSameDocumentNavigation(with puppeteer)

repro steps:

2. node ./test.js chrome_path poc_path 2>&1 |grep -E 'heap-use'
(the test.js will open 6 browser instances to ensure that the crash occurs stably)
